card: Jez — human in #bots-everywhere. Discord ID 376744299783651331. Username jezzzzzzzzzz. Contributed early emoji suggestions for the xenari conlang (with Elfiena), then retracted them saying "disregard the bullshit suggestions." Loves earl grey tea — called it "hot leaf water." Says Owo uwU unironically. Will poke you repeatedly if you ask. Native English speaker, somewhat proficient in Spanish, fluent in Toki Pona and Viossa constructed languages. Attempted the strawberry riddle test. Tried to trick Nyx with a fake constructed language. Has two discord accounts, both are the same person. Playful, chaotic, friendly.
